summary: The diff addresses all three requirements. REQ-1 (backend fix) shows backend/main.mo was modified with correct EmployeeDetails type and storage operations. REQ-2 (AddEmployeeForm fix) shows proper date-to-nanoseconds conversion, optional field handling, inline validation errors, and success toast. REQ-3 (useQueries.ts fix) shows the critical bug fix (createEmployee to addEmployee), cache invalidation on mutation, loading/error states in EmployeeDirectory and EmployeeProfile pages. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: useCreateEmployee alias kept for backward compatibility
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not ask for a backward-compatible alias; this is an extra addition not requested.
